prompt: Edit image 1: Preserve the spore structures. Change background to image 3's bright, particle-filled clarity. Apply image 2's detailed green cellular pattern and color to the textured base below the spores.
prompt_refined: Edit the provided source image (image 1). Preserve the two distinct, rounded spore structures and their translucent stalks, maintaining their current position and form. Apply the detailed green cellular pattern and vibrant green color from image 2 to the dark, textured, granular base visible beneath the spore structures in image 1.
